Interface Platform

public interface Platform
Abstraction over runtime platform (Bukkit, Fabric, NeoForge, etc.).

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Path
    configDir()
    Base directory for configs/lang files.
    Audience
    console()
    Audience representing console/server.
    boolean
    isMainThread()
    Determine if the current thread is the platform main thread.
    PlatformLogger
    logger()
    Primary logger for platform.
    Collection<Audience>
    onlinePlayers()
    Snapshot of online player audiences, if applicable.
    default void
    runForAudience(Audience audience, Runnable task)
    Executes a task in the context of a specific audience (e.g., entity region on Folia).
    void
    runOnMain(Runnable task)
    Executes a task on the main thread.
    default TaskScheduler
    scheduler()
    Returns the task scheduler for async work.
    default ListenerSubscription
    subscribePlayerLifecycle(PlayerLifecycleListener listener)
    Subscribes to normalized player join/leave events when the platform supports it.
    default ListenerSubscription
    subscribePlayerLocales(PlayerLocaleListener listener)
    Subscribes to normalized player locale updates when the platform supports it.
    default ListenerSubscription
    subscribePlayerMessages(PlayerMessageListener listener)
    Subscribes to normalized player chat/command messages when the platform supports it.
    default ThreadContext
    threadContext()
    Returns the current execution context for thread-sensitive operations.

  • Method Details

    • configDir

      Path configDir()
      Base directory for configs/lang files.
      Returns:
      config path

    • logger

      PlatformLogger logger()
      Primary logger for platform.
      Returns:
      platform logger

    • console

      Audience console()
      Audience representing console/server.
      Returns:
      console audience

    • onlinePlayers

      Collection<Audience> onlinePlayers()
      Snapshot of online player audiences, if applicable.
      Returns:
      online audiences collection (may be empty)

    • runOnMain

      void runOnMain(Runnable task)
      Executes a task on the main thread.
      Parameters:
      task - work to run

    • isMainThread

      boolean isMainThread()
      Determine if the current thread is the platform main thread.
      Returns:
      true if current thread is main/platform thread.

    • runForAudience

      default void runForAudience(Audience audience, Runnable task)
      Executes a task in the context of a specific audience (e.g., entity region on Folia). On platforms without regional threading, this delegates to runOnMain(Runnable).
      Parameters:
      audience - target audience for region resolution
      task - work to run

    • threadContext

      default ThreadContext threadContext()
      Returns the current execution context for thread-sensitive operations.
      Returns:
      thread context classification

    • scheduler

      default TaskScheduler scheduler()
      Returns the task scheduler for async work.
      Returns:
      task scheduler

    • subscribePlayerMessages

      default ListenerSubscription subscribePlayerMessages(PlayerMessageListener listener)
      Subscribes to normalized player chat/command messages when the platform supports it.
      Parameters:
      listener - message listener
      Returns:
      subscription handle, or a no-op subscription when unsupported

    • subscribePlayerLifecycle

      default ListenerSubscription subscribePlayerLifecycle(PlayerLifecycleListener listener)
      Subscribes to normalized player join/leave events when the platform supports it.
      Parameters:
      listener - lifecycle listener
      Returns:
      subscription handle, or a no-op subscription when unsupported

    • subscribePlayerLocales

      default ListenerSubscription subscribePlayerLocales(PlayerLocaleListener listener)
      Subscribes to normalized player locale updates when the platform supports it.
      Parameters:
      listener - locale listener
      Returns:
      subscription handle, or a no-op subscription when unsupported
